
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#plotting 
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(cowplot)
library(ggOceanMaps) #this package draws maps, and puts points on the maps
library (ggspatial)
library(ocedata)
library(oce) #this package draws maps, and puts points on the maps

#data handling
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(reshape2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)

setwd("C:/Users/ljabre/OneDrive - Mount Allison University/Desktop/work/projects/oceanmetaproteomesmap/")

```

2025-12-05 -- import the data
```{r}
alldata <- read.csv ("../oceanmetaproteomesmap/oceanmetaPs.csv")
```


2025-12-05  make the basemap 
```{r}
#https://www.benjaminbell.co.uk/2019/08/bathymetric-maps-in-r-getting-and.html


basemap("DecimalDegree",  bathymetry = F, #bathy.style = "rcb",
        grid.col = "NA",
        glaciers = F) + 
        geom_spatial_point(data = alldata, 
                           aes(x = Lon, y = Lat, color = citation), 
                               size = 3) 





# 
#   scale_shape_manual(values = c("Offshore" = 16, "Nearshore" = 17)) +
#         geom_spatial_label(size = 3.5, fontface = "bold",  aes(label=bioassay_latlon$bioassay, x = bioassay_latlon$lon, #could also be "text"
#                                                             y = bioassay_latlon$lat), hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.2, color = "black") +
#   theme(axis.text = element_blank(), 
#               axis.ticks.y =element_blank(),
#               axis.ticks.x =element_blank(),
#               legend.position = "none") 

```
